_meta.purpose: Populated example instance showing the full shape of a follow-up assessment record. Conducted every 4–6 sessions or when clinically indicated; compares against the initial baseline (initial-assessment.example.json).

section_b_goal_progress_review.description: Tolerate light touch to hands 3/5 trials without distress.
section_b_goal_progress_review.evidence_notes: 3/5 trials tolerated in clinic; 1/5 with novel textures.

section_b_goal_progress_review.description: Engage in sand/rice tactile bin play for 5 minutes.
section_b_goal_progress_review.evidence_notes: Sustained engagement for 7 min in last two sessions.

section_b_goal_progress_review.description: Imitate 3-step motor sequence with 1 verbal prompt.

section_b_goal_progress_review.evidence_notes: Parent log shows 18% reduction. School transitions still trigger meltdowns.

section_c_sensory_processing_progress_ch.notes: Heavy work routine helping; less crashing.
No change — noise-cancelling headphones in use.

section_d_follow_up_clinical_questions.improvements_at_home_or_school: Mother reports child voluntarily participated in messy art class twice. Less resistance to bath time. Teacher notes one full circle-time without leaving group.
section_d_follow_up_clinical_questions.regression_new_concerns: New sleep onset difficulty starting 2 weeks ago; correlates with school field trip. No skill regression.
section_d_follow_up_clinical_questions.school_performance_changes: Teacher reports increased peer initiation; still struggles with handwriting tasks.
section_d_follow_up_clinical_questions.behavior_emotional_regulation_changes: Uses 'breathing card' independently 2/5 times when prompted by teacher.
section_d_follow_up_clinical_questions.new_skills_observed: Self-fed yogurt with spoon; tolerated short haircut at salon.
section_d_follow_up_clinical_questions.equipment_or_sensory_tools_effectively_u: Weighted lap pad daily; chewy necklace during homework; noise-cancelling headphones in transit.
section_d_follow_up_clinical_questions.therapist_clinical_observations_this_ses: Child presented regulated. Engaged in tactile circuit for 15 min including sand bin (new). Resisted vertical writing surface task; agreed after weighted vest. Mother reports good carry-over of brushing protocol.

updated_goals_for_next_period.description: Tolerate light touch to hands 4/5 trials including novel textures.
Initiate use of breathing/regulation card independently 3/5 dysregulation events.

section_e_plan_adjustment_next_steps.updated_home_program_sensory_diet: Add evening bedtime routine: 5 min rocker + dim lighting + weighted blanket. Continue Wilbarger brushing 2x daily. Trial visual schedule for school transitions.
section_e_plan_adjustment_next_steps.clinical_notes_for_team_supervisor: Discuss with SLP at next MDT — verbal output increasing; consider AAC trial. Recommend OT supervisor review of brushing protocol carry-over data.
